name: get_body_measurements
description: Retrieve body measurements recorded by Withings smart scales. Returns data points for weight, fat mass, fat-free mass, muscle mass, bone mass, body water percentage, and BMI. Results are timestamped and can be filtered by date range and measurement type.

parameters.name: meastype
parameters.description: Filter by measurement type. 1=Weight, 6=Fat Ratio, 8=Fat Mass, 76=Muscle Mass, 77=Water Mass, 88=Bone Mass.

parameters.name: startdate
parameters.description: Start of the date range as a Unix timestamp.

parameters.name: enddate
parameters.description: End of the date range as a Unix timestamp.

parameters.name: lastupdate
parameters.description: Only return measurements updated after this Unix timestamp. Useful for incremental sync.
